key_issues: APPROVED. I1 RESOLVED: the three-encoding menu is gone — the spec commits to ONE mechanism (provider-held weak (make-weak-hasheq) handle->ignored-keyword-list, read via (provider-warnings-for provider handle)); provider-compile still returns a single compiled-validator? (item-010 AC 123 honored). The (values handle warnings) and single-mutable-slot encodings are explicitly REJECTED by name with reasons; verified their only occurrences are in rejection context, never offered as a live option. compiled-validator-warnings appears only in the 'impossible/not used' note. Weak map (vs strong) closes the handle-retention leak for item 012.

S-g RESOLVED: warnings element type pinned to (listof symbol?); every fixture uses symbol membership ((memq 'minLength …), (memq 'ipv4 …), (memq 'multipleOf …), (null? …)) across Part 6, the unknown-format case, S-c, and all Validation Results rows. Grep for a stray string-based warnings assertion ((member "…" (provider-warnings…))) returned EMPTY — none left behind. Accessor signature consistent in helpers, Implementation Step, Expected Outcomes, and provide surface.

No new inconsistency introduced (both worker-flagged risks clean): no stray string-based warnings assertion, no lingering live reference to the struck (values …) option or the compiled-validator-warnings accessor. The remaining two 'implementer picks a branch' phrasings are the explicitly-sanctioned, bounded-latitude ones (S-c malformed-deferred-value raise-vs-ignore — chosen branch MUST be tested either way; S-g unknown-format marker form — both candidates are symbol/pair values compatible with the memq fixtures), NOT warnings indecision and NOT contract-affecting.

Regression check passed: C1 collect-all exact counts, C2/C3 check-not-exn crash guards + no-type variants, C4/N2 recorded-list warn-once conjunction, C5/C6 format rigor, S-a/S-b/S-d/S-e/S-f all intact; S-b updated to symbol reads. Portability unaffected — make-weak-hasheq is in racket/base, no new import, the net/url ban + drift-injection walk are intact. An implementer following this spec could not ship an untested validator bug across the keyword surface, the wrong-typed-value crash surface, the error-collection policy, or the warnings side-channel. Ship it.
